description_long: This object is a traditional Japanese katana sword, featuring a long, gently curved single-edged blade with a sharp point. The blade is metallic and has a sleek, dark finish, giving it a modern and formidable appearance. The handle is cylindrical, wrapped in a textured black material with visible white accents, likely for improved grip and aesthetic appeal. A small, circular guard (tsuba) separates the blade from the handle, providing protection for the user's hand. The overall proportions are slender and elongated, with the blade making up the majority of the object's length. There are no visible decorative engravings or ornamentation on the blade or handle, and no sheath is present.
description: A sleek, black katana sword with a curved blade, textured handle, and circular guard, featuring a modern, minimalist design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the curved blade and the detailed handle wrapping.
description_view_1: End-on view highlighting the thinness of the blade and the circular shape of the guard and handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again displaying the blade's curvature and the handle's wrapping details.
description_view_3: Reverse end-on view, emphasizing the alignment of the blade, guard, and handle.
attribute_handle_design: cylindrical, black synthetic wrap with white accents, textured for grip
